query: Tell me about the AZ-104 certification
response:
## AZ-104: Microsoft Azure Administrator

### Overview
The AZ-104 exam measures your ability to manage Azure identities and governance, implement and manage storage, deploy and manage Azure compute resources, configure and manage virtual networking, and monitor and maintain Azure resources.

### Skills Measured
- Manage Azure identities and governance (20-25%)
- Implement and manage storage (15-20%)
- Deploy and manage Azure compute resources (20-25%)
- Configure and manage virtual networking (15-20%)
- Monitor and maintain Azure resources (10-15%)

### Prerequisites
- Understanding of on-premises virtualization technologies
- Understanding of networking configurations including TCP/IP and DNS
- Experience with Azure portal and command line interfaces
- Recommended experience: at least six months of hands-on experience

### Exam Format
- Duration: 120 minutes
- Question types: Multiple choice, drag-and-drop, case studies
- Passing score: 700 out of 1000
- Number of questions: 40-60

### Learning Resources
- Microsoft Learn Learning Path: AZ-104 Administrator
- Microsoft Learn free training modules
- Microsoft Learn sandbox exercises

### Certification Path
This is a role-based certification for Azure Administrators. After passing, consider AZ-305 (Solutions Architect) or specialty certifications. Renewal is required annually through Microsoft Learn assessments.
AZ-900 is an Azure certification. It costs $165. Good luck!

## AI-102: Azure AI Engineer Associate

### Overview
The AI-102 exam validates skills in building and managing AI solutions using Azure AI services. This includes natural language processing, computer vision, and generative AI.

### Skills Measured
- Plan and manage an Azure AI solution (15-20%)
- Implement content moderation solutions (10-15%)
- Implement computer vision solutions (15-20%)
- Implement natural language processing solutions (30-35%)
- Implement generative AI solutions (10-15%)

### Prerequisites
- Proficiency in Python or C#
- Knowledge of REST APIs and JSON
- Experience with Azure AI services

### Exam Format
- Duration: 100 minutes
- Passing score: 700
- Multiple choice and scenario-based questions

### Learning Resources
- Microsoft Learn: AI-102 learning path
- Azure AI services documentation
- Hands-on labs in Microsoft Learn sandbox

### Certification Path
This is a role-based certification for AI Engineers. Related certifications include AI-900 (fundamentals) and DP-100 (Data Scientist).
